description.NEAR_LANDMARK_EN: Kwai Chung Industrial Wastewater Pumping Station

2024-07-31T11:23:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to road subsidence , part of the lanes of the slip road leading from Tsuen Wan Road  to Kwai Tsing Road  near Kwai Chung Industrial Wastewater Pumping Station is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lane is available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-07-31T11:23:00.CONTENT_CN: 因路面下陷，由荃灣路通往葵青路 的支路近葵涌工業污水泵房的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-07-31T11:44:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain emergency works , all lanes of the slip road leading from Tsuen Wan Road  to Kwai Tsing Road  near Kwai Chung Industrial Wastewater Pumping Station are closed to all traffic. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is busy now.
2024-07-31T11:44:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管緊急維修，由荃灣路通往葵青路 的支路近葵涌工業污水泵房的全線現已封閉。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-07-31T12:35:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain emergency works , all lanes of the slip road leading from Tsuen Wan Road to Kwai Tsing Road near Kwai Chung Industrial Wastewater Pumping Station are closed to all traffic.   Affected KMB routes nos. 42A and 43C (Tsing Yi bound) are diverted.   Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.   Traffic is busy now.
2024-07-31T12:35:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管緊急維修，由荃灣路通往葵青路 的支路近葵涌工業污水泵房的全線現已封閉。  受影響九巴第42A及43C號線(往青衣方向)改道行駛。  駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-07-31T18:23:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain emergency works , all lanes of the slip road leading from Tsuen Wan Road to Kwai Tsing Road near Kwai Chung Industrial Wastewater Pumping Station are still being closed to all traffic.   Affected KMB bus routes 42A and 43C (Tsing Yi bound) have been diverted.   Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.   Traffic at the above location, Hing Fong Road and Kwai Fuk Road is busy now.
2024-07-31T18:23:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管緊急維修，由荃灣路通往葵青路 的支路近葵涌工業污水泵房的全線仍然封閉。  受影響九巴巴士路線42A及43C(往青衣方向)須改道行駛。  駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。  現時上址、興芳路及葵福路交通繁忙。

2024-07-31T19:51:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain emergency works , all lanes of the slip road leading from Tsuen Wan Road  to Kwai Tsing Road  near Kwai Chung Industrial Wastewater Pumping Station are still being closed to all traffic. Affected KMB bus routes 42A and 43C (Tsing Yi bound) have been diverted. Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.
2024-07-31T19:51:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管緊急維修，由荃灣路通往葵青路 的支路近葵涌工業污水泵房的全線仍然封閉。 受影響九巴第42A及43C號線(往青衣方向)須改道行駛。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。

2024-08-01T08:34:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain emergency works , all lanes of the slip road leading from Tsuen Wan Road to Kwai Tsing Road near Kwai Chung Industrial Wastewater Pumping Station are still being closed to all traffic.   Affected KMB bus routes 42A and 43C (Tsing Yi bound) have been diverted.   Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.   Traffic is busy now.
2024-08-01T08:34:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管緊急維修，由荃灣路通往葵青路 的支路近葵涌工業污水泵房的全線仍然封閉。  受影響九巴第42A及43C號線(往青衣方向)須改道行駛。  駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-08-03T06:29:00.CONTENT_EN: All lanes of the slip road leading from Tsuen Wan Road to Kwai Tsing Road near Kwai Chung Industrial Wastewater Pumping Station which were closed due to watermain emergency works are re-opened to all traffic.   Affected bus routes have gradually resumed their original routeings.
2024-08-03T06:29:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因水管緊急維修而封閉的由荃灣路通往葵青路 的支路近葵涌工業污水泵房的 全線現已解封。  受影響巴士路線現已逐漸恢復原有路線行駛。

2024-08-01T06:15:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain emergency works , all lanes of Hoi Shing Road (Hoi Kwai Road bound) between Tai Chung Road and Yuen Tun Circuit are closed to all traffic.   Vehicles travelling on Tai Chung Road are not allowed to make left turning onto Hoi Shing Road.   Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.   Traffic is busy now.
2024-08-01T06:15:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管緊急維修，海盛路(往海貴路方向)介乎大涌道與圓墩圍之間的全線現已封閉。  沿大涌道行駛的車輛不能左轉入海盛路。  駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-08-01T06:34:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain emergency works , all lanes of Hoi Shing Road (Hoi Kwai Road bound) between Tai Chung Road and Yuen Tun Circuit are closed to all traffic.   Vehicles travelling on Tai Chung Road (Tsuen Wan Road bound) are not allowed to make left turning onto Hoi Shing Road.   Motorists are advised to use alternative routes.   Traffic is busy now.
2024-08-01T06:34:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管緊急維修，海盛路(往海貴路方向)介乎大涌道與圓墩圍之間的全線現已封閉。  沿大涌道(往荃灣路方向)行駛的車輛不能左轉入海盛路。  駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-08-03T08:42:00.CONTENT_EN: All lanes of Hoi Shing Road (Hoi Kwai Road bound) between Tai Chung Road and Yuen Tun Circuit which were closed due to watermain emergency works are re-opened to all traffic.
2024-08-03T08:42:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因水管緊急維修而封閉的海盛路(往海貴路方向)介乎大涌道與圓墩圍之間的全線現已解封。

2024-08-01T19:20:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain burst , all lanes of Saigon Street  between Wai Ching Street and Ferry Street are closed to all traffic. Motorists may use alternative routing. At the same time, the slow lane of Ferry Street (Tsim Sha Tsui bound) near Saigon Street is also closed. Traffic is busy now.
2024-08-01T19:20:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管爆裂，西貢街介乎偉晴街與渡船街之間的全線現已封閉。 駕駛人士可改用其他道路。 同時，渡船街(往尖沙咀方向)近西貢街的慢線亦已封閉。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-08-01T22:29:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain burst , the fast lane of Saigon Street  between Wai Ching Street and Ferry Street is closed to all traffic. At the same time, the slow lane of Ferry Street (Tsim Sha Tsui bound) near Saigon Street is also closed. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists.
2024-08-01T22:29:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管爆裂，西貢街介乎偉晴街與渡船街之間的快線現已封閉。 同時，渡船街(往尖沙咀方向)近西貢街的慢線亦已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。

2024-08-04T08:04:00.CONTENT_EN: The fast lane of Saigon Street  between Wai Ching Street and Ferry Street which was closed due to watermain burst is re-opened to all traffic. At the same time, the slow lane of Ferry Street (Tsim Sha Tsui bound) near Saigon Street is also re-opened to all traffic.
2024-08-04T08:04:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因水管爆裂而封閉的西貢街介乎偉晴街與渡船街之間的快線現已解封。 同時，渡船街(往尖沙咀方向)近西貢街的慢線亦已解封。

2024-08-02T13:05:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因交通意外而封閉的屯門公路(往九龍方向)近三聖的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-08-02T14:32:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to vehicle breakdown , part of the lanes of Kwun Tong Road (Yau Tong bound) near Kai Yip Estate is closed to all traffic. Only remaining lanes are available to motorists. Traffic is busy now.
2024-08-02T14:32:00.CONTENT_CN: 因車輛故障，觀塘道(往油塘方向)近啓業邨的部份行車線現已封閉。 駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-08-02T15:21:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因車輛故障而封閉的觀塘道(往油塘方向)近啓業邨的部份行車線現已解封。

2024-08-02T15:10:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , all lanes of Tai Tam Road (both bounds) near Shek O Road are closed to all traffic. Traffic is busy now.
2024-08-02T15:10:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，大潭道(來回方向)近石澳道的全線現已封閉。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-08-02T15:29:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to traffic accident , the one-lane-two-way traffic arrangement is being implemented on Tai Tam Road near Shek O Road. Traffic is busy now.
2024-08-02T15:29:00.CONTENT_CN: 因交通意外，大潭道近石澳道現已實施單線雙程行車措施。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-08-02T15:05:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to watermain burst , all lanes of Ma Tau Wai Road (Hung Hom bound) between Hok Yuen Street and Tai Wan Road are closed to all traffic. Vehicles are prohibited from making right turn from Fat Kwong Street onto Ma Tau Wai Road (Hung Hom bound) and making left turn from Man Yue Street onto Ma Tau Wai Road (Hung Hom bound). Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Traffic is busy now.
2024-08-02T15:05:00.CONTENT_CN: 因水管爆裂，馬頭圍道(往紅磡方向)介乎鶴園街與大環道之間的全線現已封閉。 車輛禁止由佛光街右轉入馬頭圍道(往紅磡方向)及禁止由民裕街左轉入馬頭圍道(往紅磡方向)。 駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。 現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-08-02T15:49:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to watermain burst , all lanes of Ma Tau Wai Road (Hung Hom bound) between Hok Yuen Street and Tai Wan Road are closed to all traffic. 
Vehicles are prohibited from making right turn from Fat Kwong Street onto Ma Tau Wai Road (Hung Hom bound) and making left turn from Man Yue Street onto Ma Tau Wai Road (Hung Hom bound). Motorists are advised to use alternative routes. Affected bus routes have to be diverted:
- 5D, 12A, 115 (Telford Gardens/ Whampoa Gardens/ Central bound)
- 3B, 5C, 11K, 11X, 15,15X, 21, 45, 241X (Hung Hom/ Tsim Sha Tsui Ferry/ Lai Yiu/ Cheung Tsing bound)
- 85X, 297, 297P (Hung Hom (Hung Luen Road) bound)
- 2E, 6C, 6F, 106, 106P (Pak Tin/ Mei Foo/ Lai Kok/ Siu Sai Wan bound)
- 7B, 8 (Hung Hom/ Tsim Sha Tsui bound).  Traffic is busy now.
2024-08-02T15:49:00.CONTENT_CN:
因水管爆裂，馬頭圍道(往紅磡方向)介乎鶴園街與大環道之間的全線現已封閉。
車輛禁止由佛光街右轉入馬頭圍道(往紅磡方向)及禁止由民裕街左轉入馬頭圍道(往紅磡方向)。駕駛人士請考慮改用其他道路。
受影響巴士路線須改道行駛：
-路線5D,12A,115 (往德福花園/黃埔花園/中環方向)
-路線3B,5C,11K,11X,15,15X,21,45,241X (往紅磡/尖沙咀碼頭/麗瑤/長青方向)
-路線85X,297,297P (往紅磡(紅鸞道)方向)
-路線2E,6C,6F,106,106P (往白田/美孚/麗閣/小西灣方向)
-路線7B,8 (往紅磡/尖沙咀方向)。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-08-02T16:56:00.CONTENT_EN:
The fast lane of Ma Tau Wai Road (Hung Hom bound) between Hok Yuen Street and Tai Wan Road which was closed due to watermain burst is re-opened to all traffic;
the slow lane of Ma Tau Wai Road (Hung Hom bound) between Hok Yuen Street and Tai Wan Road is closed to all traffic. 
The traffic arrangement of banning right turn from Fat Kwong Street onto Ma Tau Wai Road (Hung Hom bound) and left turn from Man Yue Street onto Ma Tau Wai Road (Hung Hom bound) which were implemented before are now cancelled. 
Affected bus routes have resumed their original routeings. Only remaining lane is still available to motorists.   Traffic is busy now.
2024-08-02T16:56:00.CONTENT_CN:
較早前因水管爆裂而封閉的馬頭圍道(往紅磡方向)介乎鶴園街與大環道之間的快線現已解封;
馬頭圍道(往紅磡方向)介乎鶴園街與大環道之間的慢線現已封閉。
較早前實施的禁止車輛由佛光街右轉入馬頭圍道(往紅磡方向)及禁止由民裕街左轉入馬頭圍道(往紅磡方向)的行車措施現已取消。
受影響巴士路線現已恢復原有路線行駛。駕駛人士只可使用餘下行車線行車。  現時上址交通繁忙。

2024-08-02T23:03:00.CONTENT_EN: The slow lane of Ma Tau Wai Road (Hung Hom bound) between Hok Yuen Street and Tai Wan Road which was closed due to watermain burst is re-opened to all traffic; the fast lane of Ma Tau Wai Road (Hung Hom bound) between Hok Yuen Street and Tai Wan Road is closed to all traffic.
2024-08-02T23:03:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因水管爆裂而封閉的馬頭圍道(往紅磡方向)介乎鶴園街與大環道之間的慢線現已解封; 馬頭圍道(往紅磡方向)介乎鶴園街與大環道之間的快線現已封閉。

2024-08-04T08:07:00.CONTENT_EN: The fast lane of Ma Tau Wai Road (Hung Hom bound) between Hok Yuen Street and Tai Wan Road which was closed due to watermain burst is re-opened to all traffic.
2024-08-04T08:07:00.CONTENT_CN: 較早前因水管爆裂而封閉的馬頭圍道(往紅磡方向)介乎鶴園街與大環道之間的快線現已解封。
